# Copilot instructions — header rules

When making changes to page headers, follow the project's header guidelines:

- Reference: docs/header-guidelines.md
- Use Material Design principles for spacing, typography, and accessibility.
- Prefer existing utility classes for colors/spacing; add a small component-scoped CSS module for header-specific tokens and layout refinements.
- Ensure interactive elements include aria-labels and meet WCAG AA contrast.

This file is authoritative for Copilot agents when altering or creating page headers.
